'''ngawuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vyacheslavite|vyacheslavite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vyacheslavite|vyacheslavite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngawuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæwiyith|ngæwiyith]] || [[word:ngæwiyij|ngæwiyij]] || [[word:ngæwiyish|ngæwiyish]] || [[word:ngæwiyi|ngæwiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawuwuyuth|ngawuwuyuth]] || [[word:ngawuwuyuj|ngawuwuyuj]] || [[word:ngawuwuyush|ngawuwuyush]] || [[word:ngawuwuyu|ngawuwuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawuyuth|ngawuyuth]] || [[word:ngawuyuj|ngawuyuj]] || [[word:ngawuyush|ngawuyush]] || [[word:ngawuyu|ngawuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawufyuth|ngawufyuth]] || [[word:ngawufyuj|ngawufyuj]] || [[word:ngawufyush|ngawufyush]] || [[word:ngawufyuf|ngawufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngawuyuthu|ngawuyuthu]] || [[word:ngawuyuju|ngawuyuju]] || [[word:ngawuyushu|ngawuyushu]] || [[word:ngawuyuku|ngawuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngawuyuth|ngawuyuth]] || [[word:ngawuyuj|ngawuyuj]] || [[word:ngawuyush|ngawuyush]] || [[word:ngawuyu|ngawuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngawuyuthul|ngawuyuthul]] || [[word:ngawuyujul|ngawuyujul]] || [[word:ngawuyushul|ngawuyushul]] || [[word:ngawuyukul|ngawuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngawuyuthuthu|ngawuyuthuthu]] || [[word:ngawuyujuju|ngawuyujuju]] || [[word:ngawuyushushu|ngawuyushushu]] || [[word:ngawuyuku|ngawuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngawuyuthun|ngawuyuthun]] || [[word:ngawuyujun|ngawuyujun]] || [[word:ngawuyushun|ngawuyushun]] || [[word:ngawuyukun|ngawuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngawuyuthuoro|ngawuyuthuoro]] || [[word:ngawuyujuoro|ngawuyujuoro]] || [[word:ngawuyushuoro|ngawuyushuoro]] || [[word:ngawuyukuoro|ngawuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
